history.text: Principality ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
A kingdom was proclaimed, placing monarchy at the centre of Serbia's state authority.
Serbia was reorganized as an empire, expanding monarchical authority and status.
Despotate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Principality of Serbia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The Kingdom of Serbia emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
The Kingdom of Yugoslavia emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Socialist Yugoslavia (constituent republic) introduced a new form of state rule.

worthSeeing.title: Belgrade Nightlife:
worthSeeing.text: Floating clubs on the Sava and Danube keep the city alive until dawn.

worthSeeing.title: Novi Sad EXIT Festival:
worthSeeing.text: One of Europe's best summer music festivals held in a 18th-century fortress.

worthSeeing.title: Djavolja Varoš:
worthSeeing.text: Devil's Town — natural stone columns caused by volcanic erosion.
